Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Abelian categories *)
(** ** Contents
- Definition of Abelian categories
- isMonic f -> isEpi f -> is_z_isomorphism f
- Pushouts of monics and pullbacks of epis
 - Pushouts of monics
 - Pullbacks of epis
- Equalizers and Coequalizers
 - Equalizers
 - Coequalizers
- Pullbacks and Pushouts
- Results on Monics and Epis
 - Monic implies Zero kernel
 - Epi implies Zero cokernel
 - Zero kernel implies Monic
 - Zero cokernel implies Epi
- Factorization of morphisms
 - CoIm to Im factorization
 - Epi ;; Monic factorization
- Monic is kernel of any cokernel of it, Epi is cokernel of any kernel of it
- A Abelian -> A^op Abelian
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Kernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Cokernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Opp.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "- _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ - _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * Definition of Abelian categories
   Abelian category is a [precategory] which has
   - A zero object
   - Binary products and binary coproducts
   - Kernels and cokernels
   - Every monic is kernel of its cokernel and every epi is cokernel of its kernel
*)
Section def_abelian.

  (** ** Data1
     - Zero
     - Binary direct products
     - Binary direct coproducts
   *)

  Definition Data1 (C : category) : UU := Zero C × (BinProducts C) × (BinCoproducts C).

  Definition make_Data1 {C : category} (H1 : Zero C) (H2 : BinProducts C) (H3 : BinCoproducts C) :
    Data1 C := (H1,,(H2,,H3)).

  Definition to_Zero {C : category} (D : Data1 C) : Zero C := dirprod_pr1 D.

  Definition to_BinProducts {C : category} (D : Data1 C) : BinProducts C :=
    dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 D).

  Definition to_BinCoproducts {C : category} (D : Data1 C) : BinCoproducts C :=
    dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 D).

  (** ** Data2
     - Kernels
     - Cokernels
   *)

  Definition Data2 (C : category) (D1 : Data1 C) : UU :=
    (Kernels (to_Zero D1)) × (Cokernels (to_Zero D1)).

  Definition make_Data2 {C : category} (D1 : Data1 C) (H1 : Kernels (to_Zero D1))
             (H2 : Cokernels (to_Zero D1)) : Data2 C D1 := make_dirprod H1 H2.

  Definition to_Kernels {C : category} {D1 : Data1 C} (D2 : Data2 C D1) :
    Kernels (to_Zero D1) := dirprod_pr1 D2.

  Definition to_Cokernels {C : category} {D1 : Data1 C} (D2 : Data2 C D1) :
    Cokernels (to_Zero D1) := dirprod_pr2 D2.

  (** ** Every monic is kernel of its cokernel *)

  Definition MonicsAreKernels (C : category) (D1 : Data1 C) (D2 : Data2 C D1) : UU :=
    ∏ (x y : C) (M : Monic C x y),
    isKernel (pr1 D1) M (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 x y M))
             (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1) (to_Cokernels D2 x y M)).

  Definition make_MonicsAreKernels {C : category} (D1 : Data1 C) (D2 : Data2 C D1)
             (H : ∏ (x y : C) (M : Monic C x y),
                  isKernel (pr1 D1) M (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 x y M))
                           (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1) (to_Cokernels D2 x y M))) :
    MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2 := H.

  (** ** Every epi is a cokernel of its kernel *)

  Definition EpisAreCokernels (C : category) (D1 : Data1 C) (D2 : Data2 C D1) : UU :=
    ∏ (x y : C) (E : Epi C x y),
    isCokernel (pr1 D1) (KernelArrow (to_Kernels D2 x y E)) E
               (KernelCompZero (to_Zero D1) (to_Kernels D2 x y E)).

  Definition make_EpisAreCokernels {C : category} (D1 : Data1 C) (D2 : Data2 C D1)
             (H : ∏ (x y : C) (E : Epi C x y),
                  isCokernel (pr1 D1) (KernelArrow (to_Kernels D2 x y E)) E
                             (KernelCompZero (to_Zero D1) (to_Kernels D2 x y E))) :
    EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2 := H.

  (** ** AbelianData
     - Data2
     - MonicsAreKernels
     - EpisAreCokernels
   *)

  Definition AbelianData (C : category) (D1 : Data1 C) : UU :=
    ∑ D2 : Data2 C D1, (MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2) × (EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2).

  Definition make_AbelianData {C : category} {D1 : Data1 C} (D2 : Data2 C D1)
             (H1 : MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2) (H2 : EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2) :
    AbelianData C D1 := tpair _ D2 (make_dirprod H1 H2).

  (** ** Abelian categories *)

  Definition AbelianPreCat : UU := ∑ A : (∑ C : category, Data1 C), AbelianData (pr1 A) (pr2 A).

  Definition precategory_of_AbelianPreCat (A : AbelianPreCat) : category := pr1 (pr1 A).
  Coercion precategory_of_AbelianPreCat : AbelianPreCat >-> category.

  Definition make_Abelian (C : category) (AD1 : Data1 C) (AD : AbelianData C AD1) :
    AbelianPreCat := tpair _ (tpair _ C AD1) AD.

  Definition to_Data1 (A : AbelianPreCat) : Data1 A := pr2 (pr1 A).
  Coercion to_Data1 : AbelianPreCat >-> Data1.

  Definition to_Data2 (A : AbelianPreCat) : Data2 A (to_Data1 A) := pr1 (pr2 A).
  Coercion to_Data2 : AbelianPreCat >-> Data2.

  Definition to_MonicsAreKernels (A : AbelianPreCat) :
    MonicsAreKernels A (to_Data1 A) (to_Data2 A) := dirprod_pr1 (pr2 (pr2 A)).

  Definition to_EpisAreCokernels (A : AbelianPreCat) :
    EpisAreCokernels A (to_Data1 A) (to_Data2 A) := dirprod_pr2 (pr2 (pr2 A)).

  Definition MonicToKernel {A : AbelianPreCat} {x y : A} (M : Monic A x y) :
    Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x y M)) :=
    make_Kernel (to_Zero A) _ _ _ (to_MonicsAreKernels A x y M).

  Definition EpiToCokernel {A : AbelianPreCat} {x y : A} (E : Epi A x y) :
    Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E)) :=
    make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) _ _ _ (to_EpisAreCokernels A x y E).

End def_abelian.
Arguments to_Zero [C].

Declare Scope abelian_precat_scope.
Bind Scope abelian_precat_scope with precategory.
Declare Scope abelian_precat.
Notation "0" := Zero : abelian_precat.
Delimit Scope abelian_precat_scope with precategory.

(** * isMonic f -> isEpi f -> is_z_isomorphism f
  In abelian categories morphisms which are both monic and epi are isomorphisms [monic_epi_is_iso].
*)
Section abelian_monic_epi_iso.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
identity y
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
identity y
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM)) =
f
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
p0:= KernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)): KernelArrow (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM))
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM))
  (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM))
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM)) =
f
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
p0: KernelArrow (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM))
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM)) =
f
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM))
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM)) =
f
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
    (to_Cokernels A x y (make_Monic A f iM))

    exact p0.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y
     (identity y) (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y
     (identity y) (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y (identity y)
    (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE) = identity x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y (identity y)
  (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE) · f = identity y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y (identity y)
    (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE) = identity x
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y (identity y)
    (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE) · f = identity x · f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y (identity y)
    (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE) · f = identity x · f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y
     (identity y) (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE) · f) =
identity x · f

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f · identity y = identity x · f

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f = identity x · f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
f = f

      apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y (identity y)
  (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE) · f = identity y
 exact (KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) _ _ _).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic f → isEpi f → is_z_isomorphism f

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic f → isEpi f → is_z_isomorphism f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
is_z_isomorphism f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
A ⟦ y, x ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
is_inverse_in_precat f ?g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
A ⟦ y, x ⟧
 exact (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel (make_Monic _ _ iM)) y (identity y)
                      (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y
     (identity y) (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE))
 exact (monic_epi_is_iso_inverses iM iE).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic f → isEpi f → z_iso x y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic f → isEpi f → z_iso x y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
z_iso x y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
A ⟦ x, y ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
A ⟦ y, x ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
A ⟦ x, y ⟧
 exact f.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
A ⟦ y, x ⟧
 exact (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel (make_Monic _ _ iM)) y (identity y)
                      (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
iM: isMonic f
iE: isEpi f
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A f iM)) y
     (identity y) (monic_epi_is_iso_eq iM iE))
 exact (monic_epi_is_iso_inverses iM iE).
  Defined.

End abelian_monic_epi_iso.


(** * Pullbacks of monics and pushouts of epis
  In the following section we prove that an abelian category has pullbacks of monics and pushouts of
  epis.
*)
Section abelian_monic_pullbacks.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.

  (** ** Pullbacks of monics *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
tmp:= BinProductPr1Commutes A 
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1) 
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2) BinProd z
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
tmp: KernelArrow ker
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
tmp: KernelArrow ker
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
KernelArrow ker
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker BinProd
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

    apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
tmp:= BinProductPr2Commutes A 
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1) 
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2) BinProd z
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
tmp: KernelArrow ker
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
tmp: KernelArrow ker
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
KernelArrow ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
KernelArrow ker
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker BinProd
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

    apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M1) ker
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M2) ker
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M1) ker
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M2) ker
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M2) ker
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow ker

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

    (* variables *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker

      apply (KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker1 _ (KernelArrow ker)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker

      apply (KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker2 _ (KernelArrow ker)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
isPullback (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker)

    (* isPullback *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
∏ (e : A) (h : A ⟦ e, x ⟧) (k : A ⟦ e, y ⟧),
h · M1 = k · M2
→ ∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
  hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
  × hk
    · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
        (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

    (* First we show that h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow by uniqueness of the morphism to product. *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
      (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z

  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))

  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧

KernelArrow ker

k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧

h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
h
· (KernelArrow ker1
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
ee1:= KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) ker1: KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker1
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
h
· (KernelArrow ker1
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
ee1:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1): M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
h
· (KernelArrow ker1
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
ee1:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1): M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
h · (M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
ee1:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1): M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

      apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
k · KernelArrow ker2
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · KernelArrow ker2
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
      (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
k · KernelArrow ker2
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
k
· (KernelArrow ker2
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
ee2:= KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) ker2: KernelArrow ker2
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker2
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
k
· (KernelArrow ker2
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
ee2:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2): M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
k
· (KernelArrow ker2
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
ee2:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2): M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
k · (M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
ee2:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2): M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
k · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

      apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · KernelArrow ker1
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · KernelArrow ker2
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))

h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧

e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =

e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
      (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker

h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A

M2: Monic A y z

  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)

KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 apply e2.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd

h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧

e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =

e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =

e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd

hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)

× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker

      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A

  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (h · M1 · ar · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
  (h · M1 · ar · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
tmp1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A 
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2) BinProd z
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
h · M1 · (ar · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)

CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
 apply e1.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
h · M1 · ar · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
h · M1 · (ar · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
tmp1:= BinProductPr2Commutes A 
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2) BinProd z
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
h · M1 · (ar · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
tmp1:= BinProductPr2Commutes A 
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2) BinProd z
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): ar · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
h · M1 · (ar · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
tmp1:= BinProductPr2Commutes A 
  (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2) BinProd z
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): ar · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
 apply e'1.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
∃! hk : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
hk
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× hk
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
