KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
(λ t : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
 t
 · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
 × t
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
       (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k) 
  ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
∏ y0 : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
    t
    · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
        (KernelArrow ker)
        (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
    × t
      · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
          (KernelArrow ker)
          (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k)
     y0)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
∏ y0 : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
 t
 · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
 × t
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
       (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k) y0
→ y0 = ?x

    (* The arrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
h · M1
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
 apply e''1.
    (* commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
(λ t : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
 t
 · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
 × t
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
· KernelArrow ker1 = h · KernelArrow ker1
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
h · M1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1) =
h · M1

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
com'1:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  com1: (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
   · M1) =
(λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  (KernelArrow ker)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1) =
h · M1

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
com'1:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
   · M1) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1) =
h · M1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
com'1:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
   · M1) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker = h · M1
 use KernelCommutes.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
· KernelArrow ker2 = k · KernelArrow ker2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
k · M2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2) =
k · M2

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
com'2:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  com2: (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
   · M2) =
(λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  (KernelArrow ker)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2) =
k · M2

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
com'2:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
   · M2) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2) =
k · M2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
com'2:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
   · M2) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker = k · M2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
com'2:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ ker, z ⟧,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1 · f)
  com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
   · M2) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker = h · M1
 use KernelCommutes.
    (* Equality of equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
∏ y0 : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
    t
    · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
        (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
    × t
      · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
          (KernelArrow ker)
          (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k)
     y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
    t
    · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
        (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
    × t
      · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
          (KernelArrow ker)
          (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k)
     y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
isaprop
  (y0
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
isaprop
  (y0
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
       (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
isaprop
  (y0
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h)
 apply hs.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
isaprop
  (y0
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k)
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
∏ y0 : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
 t
 · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
 × t
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k) y0
→ y0 = KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ e, ker ⟧,
 t
 · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
     (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
 × t
   · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
       (KernelArrow ker)
       (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k)
  y0
y0 = KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
t: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
× y0
  · KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker
      (KernelArrow ker)
      (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k
y0 = KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
t: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
p: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k
y0 = KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
t: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
p: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k
y0 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker e (h · M1) e''1
· KernelArrow ker

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
t: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
p: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k
y0 · KernelArrow ker = h · M1

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
t: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
p: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k
y0
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
     (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
   · KernelArrow ker1) = h · M1

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
t: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
p: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k
y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker)
· KernelArrow ker1 = h · M1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
BinProd: BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
     (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)))
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
com1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M1 =
KernelArrow ker
com2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
  (KernelArrow ker)
  (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) · M2 =
KernelArrow ker
e: A
h: A ⟦ e, x ⟧
k: A ⟦ e, y ⟧
H: h · M1 = k · M2
e1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
e2: k · M2 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e'1: h · M1 · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
e''1: h · M1 · ar = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) e BinProd
y0: A ⟦ e, ker ⟧
t: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = h
p: y0
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker 
    (KernelArrow ker)
    (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker) = k
h · KernelArrow ker1 = h · M1

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** Construction of the Pullback of monics. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
Pullback M1 M2

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
Pullback M1 M2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
Pullback M1 M2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
Pullback M1 M2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2): BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
Pullback M1 M2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2): BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
Pullback M1 M2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
M1: Monic A x z
M2: Monic A y z
ker1:= MonicToKernel M1: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
ker2:= MonicToKernel M2: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2))
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2): BinProduct A (to_Cokernels A x z M1)
  (to_Cokernels A y z M2)
ar:= BinProductArrow A BinProd
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A x z M1))
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A y z M2)): A ⟦ z, BinProd ⟧
ker:= to_Kernels A z BinProd ar: Kernel (to_Zero A) ar
Pullback M1 M2

    use (@make_Pullback _ _ _ _ M1 M2 ker
           (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker1 ker (KernelArrow ker) (monics_Pullback_eq1 M1 M2 BinProd ker))
           (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker2 ker (KernelArrow ker) (monics_Pullback_eq2 M1 M2 BinProd ker))
           (monics_Pullback_eq3 M1 M2 BinProd ker) (monics_Pullback_isPullback M1 M2 BinProd ker)).
  Defined.


  (** ** Pushouts of epis *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) coker

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) coker

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A 
  (to_Kernels A x y E1) 
  (to_Kernels A x z E2) BinCoprod x
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) coker

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
· CokernelArrow coker
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) coker

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
· CokernelArrow coker
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) coker

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
· CokernelArrow coker
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
   · CokernelArrow coker) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) coker
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1)
· CokernelArrow coker
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) coker

    apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) coker

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) coker

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes A 
  (to_Kernels A x y E1) 
  (to_Kernels A x z E2) BinCoprod x
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) coker

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
· CokernelArrow coker
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) coker

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
· CokernelArrow coker
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) coker

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
· CokernelArrow coker
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
   · CokernelArrow coker) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) coker
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
tmp: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
    (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
· CokernelArrow coker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)
· CokernelArrow coker
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) coker

    apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E1) coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E2) coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E1) coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E2) coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
CokernelArrow coker =
E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E2) coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
CokernelArrow coker = CokernelArrow coker

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
isPushout E1 E2
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E1) coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E2) coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
  (epis_Pushout_eq3 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)

     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))

     (CokernelArrow coker)

  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E2) coker

x, y, z: A

E2: Epi A x z

  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
isPushout E1 E2
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
  (epis_Pushout_eq3 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
isPushout E1 E2
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
  (epis_Pushout_eq3 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker

      apply (CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker1 _ (CokernelArrow coker)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
isPushout E1 E2
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))

CokernelArrow coker
E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
