  (λ f : A ⟦ x, coker ⟧,
   f
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
       (E1 · h) e''1) com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
    (E1 · h) e''1 =
CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
    (E1 · h) e''1
E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1 =
E1 · h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
com'1:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ x, coker ⟧,
   f
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
       (E1 · h) e''1) com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
    (E1 · h) e''1 =
CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
    (E1 · h) e''1
CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1 =
E1 · h

        use CokernelCommutes.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1 = k
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
CokernelArrow coker2
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1) =
CokernelArrow coker2 · k

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
com'2:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ x, coker ⟧,
   f
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
       (E1 · h) e''1) com2: (λ f : A ⟦ x, coker ⟧,
 f
 · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
     (E1 · h) e''1)
  (E2
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
       (CokernelArrow coker)
       (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)) =
(λ f : A ⟦ x, coker ⟧,
 f
 · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
     (E1 · h) e''1) (CokernelArrow coker)
E2
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1) =
E2 · k

h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =

    (CokernelArrow coker)

    (E1 · h) e''1 =
CokernelArrow coker

e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
com'2:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ x, coker ⟧,
   f
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
       (E1 · h) e''1) com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
    (E1 · h) e''1 =
CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e 
    (E1 · h) e''1
CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1 =
E1 · h

        use CokernelCommutes.
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
∏ y0 : A ⟦ coker, e ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ coker, e ⟧,
    CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
      (CokernelArrow coker)
      (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · t = h
    × CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
        (CokernelArrow coker)
        (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · t =
      k) y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ coker, e ⟧,
    CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
      (CokernelArrow coker)
      (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · t = h
    × CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
        (CokernelArrow coker)
        (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · t =
      k) y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
isaprop
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 = h)

x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y

coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)

     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))

coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))

    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker

h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =

e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =

     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 = k)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
isaprop
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 = h)
 apply hs.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
isaprop
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 = k)
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
∏ y0 : A ⟦ coker, e ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ coker, e ⟧,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
   (CokernelArrow coker)
   (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · t = h
 × CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · t = k)
  y0
→ y0 = CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ coker, e ⟧,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
   (CokernelArrow coker)
   (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · t =
 h
 × CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · t =
   k) y0
y0 = CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1

x, y, z: A

k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧

e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =

  (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
h
× CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
  k
y0 = CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
t: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
h
p: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
k
y0 = CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
t: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
h
p: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
k
CokernelArrow coker · y0 =
CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker e (E1 · h) e''1

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
t: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
h
p: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
k
CokernelArrow coker · y0 = E1 · h

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e

t: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
h
p: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
k
CokernelArrow coker1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
E1 · h

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
t: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
h
p: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
k
CokernelArrow coker1
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
     (CokernelArrow coker)
     (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0) =
E1 · h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
BinCoprod: BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
     (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)))
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
com1: E1
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
com2: E2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
    (CokernelArrow coker)
    (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) =
CokernelArrow coker
e: A
h: A ⟦ y, e ⟧
k: A ⟦ z, e ⟧
H: E1 · h = E2 · k
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2) · E1 · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x z E2) e
e'2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1) · E2 · k =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x y E1) e
e''1: ar · (E1 · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) BinCoprod e
y0: A ⟦ coker, e ⟧
t: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
h
p: CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker
  (CokernelArrow coker)
  (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker) · y0 =
k
CokernelArrow coker1 · h = E1 · h

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
Pushout E1 E2

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
Pushout E1 E2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
Pushout E1 E2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
Pushout E1 E2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2): BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
Pushout E1 E2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2): BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Pushout E1 E2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
E1: Epi A x y
E2: Epi A x z
coker1:= EpiToCokernel E1: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
coker2:= EpiToCokernel E2: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2))
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2): BinCoproduct (to_Kernels A x y E1)
  (to_Kernels A x z E2)
ar:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x y E1))
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x z E2)): A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
coker:= to_Cokernels A BinCoprod x ar: Cokernel (to_Zero A) ar
Pushout E1 E2

    use (make_Pushout E1 E2 coker
                    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker1 coker (CokernelArrow coker)
                                 (epis_Pushout_eq1 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
                    (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 coker (CokernelArrow coker)
                                 (epis_Pushout_eq2 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker))
                    (epis_Pushout_eq3 E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)
                    (epis_Pushout_isPushout E1 E2 BinCoprod coker)).
  Defined.

End abelian_monic_pullbacks.

(** * Equalizers and Coequalizers
  In the following section we show that equalizers and coequalizers exist in abelian categories.
*)
Section abelian_equalizers.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.

  (** ** Equalizers *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
isMonic (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ z, x ⟧
H: h1 · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f =
h2 · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ z, x ⟧
H: h1 · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
h2 · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ z, x ⟧
H: h1
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
h2 · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd
h1 = h2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ z, x ⟧
H: h1
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
h2
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ z, x ⟧
H: h1
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
h2
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd = 
identity x
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ z, x ⟧
H: h1 · identity x = h2 · identity x
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd = 
identity x
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ z, x ⟧
H: h1 = h2 · identity x
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd = 
identity x
h1 = h2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ z, x ⟧
H: h1 = h2
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd = 
identity x
h1 = h2

    exact H.
  Qed.

  Definition Equalizer_Pullback {x y : A} (f1 f2 : x --> y) :
    Pullback (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y) (identity x) f1)
             (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y) (identity x) f2) :=
    monics_Pullback A (make_Monic A _ (Equalizer_isMonic f1))
                    (make_Monic A _ (Equalizer_isMonic f2)).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb

x, y: A

     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧

  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
H2: ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
PullbackPr1 Pb · identity x = PullbackPr2 Pb

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧

  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
H2: ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
PullbackPr1 Pb · (ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
PullbackPr2 Pb

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧

  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
H2: ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
PullbackPr1 Pb · (ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
PullbackPr2 Pb · identity x

     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
H2: ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
PullbackPr1 Pb · (ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
PullbackPr2 Pb · (ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
H2: ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
PullbackPr1 Pb · ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
PullbackPr2 Pb · (ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

x, y: A

ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧

     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)

H2: ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x

PullbackPr2 Pb · ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
H2: ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
PullbackPr1 Pb · ar1 = PullbackPr2 Pb · ar2

    apply PullbackSqrCommutes.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) · f1 =
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) · f2

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) · f1 =
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) · f2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
PullbackPr1 Pb · f1 = PullbackPr1 Pb · f2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
PullbackPr1 Pb · f1 = PullbackPr1 Pb · f2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
PullbackPr1 Pb · f1 = PullbackPr1 Pb · f2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
PullbackPr1 Pb
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) = PullbackPr1 Pb · f2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
PullbackPr1 Pb
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
PullbackPr1 Pb
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
PullbackPr1 Pb
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1 =
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f1 =
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
X:= PullbackSqrCommutes (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2): PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f1 =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f2
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f1 =
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
Pb:= Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2: Pullback
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
H2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
X: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f1 =
PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f2
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f1 =
PullbackPr1 Pb
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A x y)
    (identity x) f2
 apply X.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEqualizer f1 f2
  (PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2))
  (Equalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEqualizer f1 f2
  (PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2))
  (Equalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
isEqualizer f1 f2
  (PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2))
  (Equalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
isEqualizer f1 f2
  (PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2))
  (Equalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
isEqualizer f1 f2
  (PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2))
  (Equalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, x ⟧),
h · f1 = h · f2
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
  ψ · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
ψ · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)

HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
ψ · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd = 
identity x
h · (ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) = h

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
h · (ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f1: ar1 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
h · identity x = h
 apply id_right.

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A

PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
h · ar1 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd = h · f1

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f1: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
h · (ar1 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) = h · f1

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f1: ar1 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
h · (ar1 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) = h · f1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f1: ar1 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f1
h · f1 = h · f1
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
ψ · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f2: ar2 · BinProductPr1 A BinProd = identity x
h · identity x = h
 apply id_right.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
h · ar2 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd = h · f1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
h · (ar2 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) = h · f1

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f2: BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
h · (ar2 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) = h · f1

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f2: ar2 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
h · (ar2 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) = h · f1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f2: ar2 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
h · f2 = h · f1
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes A x y BinProd x
  (identity x) f2: ar2 · BinProductPr2 A BinProd = f2
h · f1 = h · f2
 apply HH.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
ψ · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)

h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1) =
BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y

ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧

PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)

h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)

∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
ψ · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2

HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)

A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h) 
  ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
    t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h) y0)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h) y0
→ y0 = ?x

    (* The arrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧
 exact (PullbackArrow (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) w h h HH''').
    (* Commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h)
  (PullbackArrow (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) w h h
     HH''')
 apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) w h h HH''').
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
    t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h) y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
y0: A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
    t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h) y0)
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h) y0
→ y0 =
  PullbackArrow (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) w h h HH'''
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
y0: A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h)
  y0
y0 =
PullbackArrow (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) w h h HH'''

x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧

PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
y0: A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧

 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h)
