A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
y0: A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h)
  y0
y0 · PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
y0: A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h)
  y0
y0 · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h
 apply t.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
y0: A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h)
  y0
y0 · PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProd:= to_BinProducts A x y: BinProduct A x y
ar1:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f1: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
ar2:= BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity x) f2: A ⟦ x, BinProd ⟧
H:= Equalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) =
PullbackPr2 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
HH: h · f1 = h · f2
HH': h · ar1 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH'': h · ar2 = BinProductArrow A BinProd h (h · f1)
HH''': h · ar1 = h · ar2
y0: A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2 ⟧,
 t · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h)
  y0
y0 · PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2) = h
 apply t.
  Qed.

  Definition Equalizer {x y : A} (f1 f2 : x --> y) : Equalizer f1 f2 :=
    make_Equalizer f1 f2 (PullbackPr1 (Equalizer_Pullback f1 f2)) (Equalizer_eq2 f1 f2)
                 (isEqualizer f1 f2).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Equalizers A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Equalizers A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Equalizers.Equalizer f g

    apply Equalizer.
  Defined.


  (** ** Coequalizers *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
isEpi
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
isEpi
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
isEpi (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h1 =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h2
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h1) =
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h2)
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h1 =
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h2)
h1 = h2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h1 =
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h2
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h1 =
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f · h2
com1:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f =
identity x
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: identity x · h1 = identity x · h2
com1:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f =
identity x
h1 = h2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: identity x · h1 = identity x · h2
h1 = h2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: h1 = identity x · h2
h1 = h2
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
z: A
h1, h2: A ⟦ x, z ⟧
H: h1 = h2
h1 = h2

    exact H.
  Qed.

  Definition Coequalizer_Pushout {x y : A} (f1 f2 : y --> x) :
    Pushout (BinCoproductArrow (*A*) (to_BinCoproducts A x y) (identity x) f1)
            (BinCoproductArrow (*A*) (to_BinCoproducts A x y) (identity x) f2) :=
    epis_Pushout A (make_Epi A _ (Coequalizer_isEpi f1)) (make_Epi A _ (Coequalizer_isEpi f2)).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
PushoutIn1 Po = PushoutIn2 Po

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
PushoutIn1 Po = PushoutIn2 Po

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
H2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
PushoutIn1 Po = PushoutIn2 Po

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
H2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
identity x · PushoutIn1 Po = PushoutIn2 Po

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
H2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 · PushoutIn1 Po =
PushoutIn2 Po

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
H2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 · PushoutIn1 Po =
identity x · PushoutIn2 Po

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
H2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 · PushoutIn1 Po =
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 · PushoutIn2 Po

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
H2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · (ar1 · PushoutIn1 Po) =
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 · PushoutIn2 Po
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
H2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · (ar1 · PushoutIn1 Po) =
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · (ar2 · PushoutIn2 Po)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
Po:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
H1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
H2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
ar1 · PushoutIn1 Po = ar2 · PushoutIn2 Po

    apply PushoutSqrCommutes.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
f1 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
f2 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
f1 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
f2 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
f1 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
f2 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
f1 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
f2 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
f1 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
f2 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
f1 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
f2 · PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
Pb:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
f1 · PushoutIn1 Pb = f2 · PushoutIn1 Pb

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
Pb:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1
· PushoutIn1 Pb = f2 · PushoutIn1 Pb

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
Pb:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1
· PushoutIn1 Pb =
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2
· PushoutIn1 Pb

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
Pb:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1
   · PushoutIn1 Pb) =
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· (BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2
   · PushoutIn1 Pb)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
Pb:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1
· PushoutIn1 Pb =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2
· PushoutIn1 Pb

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
Pb:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
X:= PushoutSqrCommutes (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2): BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
  (identity x) f1
· PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
  (identity x) f2
· PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1
· PushoutIn1 Pb =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2
· PushoutIn1 Pb

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
Pb:= Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2: Pushout
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f1)
  (BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
     (identity x) f2)
X: BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
  (identity x) f1
· PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
BinCoproductArrow (to_BinCoproducts A x y)
  (identity x) f2
· PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1
· PushoutIn1 Pb =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2
· PushoutIn1 Pb
 apply X.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
isCoequalizer f1 f2
  (PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2))
  (Coequalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
isCoequalizer f1 f2
  (PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2))
  (Coequalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
isCoequalizer f1 f2
  (PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2))
  (Coequalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

isCoequalizer f1 f2
  (PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2))
  (Coequalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
isCoequalizer f1 f2
  (PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2))
  (Coequalizer_eq2 f1 f2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
∏ (w0 : A) (h : A ⟦ x, w0 ⟧),
f1 · h = f2 · h
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w0 ⟧,
  PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
∃! ψ : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · ψ = h

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧

ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · (ar1 · h) = h
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · (ar1 · h) = f1 · h

w: A

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
com1:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1 =
identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 · h = h

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
com1:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 · h = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
com1:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f1: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar1 = identity x
identity x · h = h
 apply id_left.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · (ar1 · h) = f1 · h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧

BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar1 · h = f1 · h

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
com2:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f1: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1 =
f1
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar1 · h = f1 · h

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
com2:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f1: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar1 = f1
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar1 · h = f1 · h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
com2:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f1: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar1 = f1
f1 · h = f1 · h
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧

PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · ψ = h

PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A

HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · ψ = h

PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A

HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
ar2 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · (ar2 · h) = h
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · (ar2 · h) = f1 · h

ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · (ar2 · h) = h

ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
com1:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2 =
identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 · h = h

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
com1:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 · h = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
com1:= BinCoproductIn1Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f2: BinCoproductIn1 BinCoprod · ar2 = identity x
identity x · h = h
 apply id_left.

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
com2:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f2: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod
· BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2 =
f2
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar2 · h = f1 · h

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
com2:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f2: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar2 = f2
BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar2 · h = f1 · h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
com2:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f2: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar2 = f2
f2 · h = f1 · h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
com2:= BinCoproductIn2Commutes A x y BinCoprod x
  (identity x) f2: BinCoproductIn2 BinCoprod · ar2 = f2
f1 · h = f2 · h
 apply HH.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · ψ = h

ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧

PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h) =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y

ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧

PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)

h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧

HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)

∃! ψ : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
(λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h) 
  ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
∏ y0 : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
    PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h) y0)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
∏ y0 : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h) y0
→ y0 = ?x

    (* The arrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
 exact (PushoutArrow (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) w h h HH''').
    (* commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
(λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h)
  (PushoutArrow (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) w h h
     HH''')
 apply (PushoutArrow_PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) w h h HH''').
    (* Equality of equality of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
∏ y0 : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
    PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h) y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
y0: A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
    PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h) y0)
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
∏ y0 : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h) y0
→ y0 =
  PushoutArrow (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) w h h HH'''
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
y0: A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h)
  y0
y0 =
PushoutArrow (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) w h h HH'''
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
y0: A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h)
  y0
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · y0 = h
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
y0: A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h)
  y0
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · y0 = h

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
y0: A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h)
  y0
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · y0 = h
 apply t.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
y0: A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h)
  y0
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · y0 = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, x ⟧
BinCoprod:= to_BinCoproducts A x y: BinCoproduct x y
ar1:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f1: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
ar2:= BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod (identity x) f2: A ⟦ BinCoprod, x ⟧
H:= Coequalizer_eq1 f1 f2: PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) =
PushoutIn2 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2)
w: A
h: A ⟦ x, w ⟧
HH: f1 · h = f2 · h
HH': ar1 · h = BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH'': ar2 · h =
BinCoproductArrow BinCoprod h (f1 · h)
HH''': ar1 · h = ar2 · h
y0: A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧
t: (λ t : A ⟦ Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2, w ⟧,
 PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · t = h)
  y0
PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2) · y0 = h
 apply t.
  Qed.

  Definition Coequalizer {x y : A} (f1 f2 : y --> x) :
    Coequalizer f1 f2 := make_Coequalizer f1 f2 (PushoutIn1 (Coequalizer_Pushout f1 f2))
                                        (Coequalizer_eq2 f1 f2) (isCoequalizer f1 f2).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Coequalizers A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Coequalizers A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Coequalizers.Coequalizer f g

    apply Coequalizer.
  Defined.

End abelian_equalizers.


(** * Pushouts and pullbacks
  Abelian categories have pullbacks and pushouts.
*)
Section abelian_pushouts.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Pullbacks A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Pullbacks A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
BinProducts A
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Equalizers.Equalizers A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Equalizers.Equalizers A

    apply (Equalizers A).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Pushouts A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Pushouts A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
BinCoproducts A
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Coequalizers.Coequalizers A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Coequalizers.Coequalizers A

    apply (Coequalizers A).
  Defined.

End abelian_pushouts.


(** * Monic kernels and Epi cokernels
  In this section we prove that kernels of monomorphisms are given by the arrows from zero and
  cokernels of epimorphisms are given by the arrows to zero.
*)
Section abelian_MonicToKernels.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.


  (** ** KernelArrow of Monic x --> y = (to_Zero A) --> x *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrowFrom x) M
  (ArrowsFromZero A (to_Zero A) y
     (ZeroArrowFrom x · M)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrowFrom x) M
  (ArrowsFromZero A (to_Zero A) y
     (ZeroArrowFrom x · M)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, x ⟧),
h · M = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, ψ · ZeroArrowFrom x = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h · M = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, ψ · ZeroArrowFrom x = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h · M = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x · M
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, ψ · ZeroArrowFrom x = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, ψ · ZeroArrowFrom x = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, t · ZeroArrowFrom x = h) ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
∏ y : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, t · ZeroArrowFrom x = h)
     y)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, t · ZeroArrowFrom x = h) y0
→ y0 = ?x

    (* The arrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _).
    (* Commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, t · ZeroArrowFrom x = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A) · ZeroArrowFrom x =
h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A) · ZeroArrowFrom x =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
    (* Equality of equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
∏ y : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, t · ZeroArrowFrom x = h)
     y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
y0: A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, t · ZeroArrowFrom x = h)
     y0)
 apply (homset_property A).
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
∏ y : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, t · ZeroArrowFrom x = h) y
→ y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
M: Monic A x y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x
y0: A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧
Y: (λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧, t · ZeroArrowFrom x = h)
  y0
y0 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
 apply ArrowsToZero.
  Qed.

  (* A kernel of a monic is the arrow from zero. *)
  Definition MonicKernelZero {x y : A} (M : Monic A x y) : Kernel (to_Zero A) M :=
    make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrowFrom _) M _ (MonicKernelZero_isKernel M).


  (** ** CokernelArrow of Epi x --> y = y --> (to_Zero A) *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
isCokernel (to_Zero A) E (ZeroArrowTo z)
  (ArrowsToZero A (to_Zero A) y (E · ZeroArrowTo z)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
isCokernel (to_Zero A) E (ZeroArrowTo z)
  (ArrowsToZero A (to_Zero A) y (E · ZeroArrowTo z)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ z, w ⟧),
E · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y w
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: E · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y w
∃! ψ : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · ψ = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: E · h = E · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
∃! ψ : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
∃! ψ : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · t = h) ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
∏ y : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · t = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
∏ y0 : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · t = h) y0
→ y0 = ?x

    (* The arrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _).
    (* Commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
ZeroArrowTo z · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w =
h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
ZeroArrowTo z · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    (* Equality of equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
∏ y : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · t = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
y0: A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · t = h)
     y0)
 apply (homset_property A).
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
∏ y : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · t = h) y
→ y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w
 
A: AbelianPreCat
y, z: A
E: Epi A y z
w: A
h: A ⟦ z, w ⟧
X: h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) z w
y0: A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧
Y: (λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧, ZeroArrowTo z · t = h)
  y0
y0 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w
 apply ArrowsFromZero.
  Qed.

  (* A cokernel of an epi is the arrow to zero. *)
  Definition EpiCokernelZero {y z : A} (E : Epi A y z) : Cokernel (to_Zero A) E :=
    make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) E (ZeroArrowTo z) _ (EpiCokernelZero_isCokernel E).


  (** ** KernelArrow = FromZero ⇒ isMonic *)

  (** The following Definitions is used in the next Definition. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
Cokernel (to_Zero A) f2

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
Cokernel (to_Zero A) f2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
A
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
A ⟦ y, ?z ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
f2 · ?g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x ?z
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
isCokernel (to_Zero A) f2 ?g ?H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
A
 exact CK.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
A ⟦ y, CK ⟧
 exact (CokernelArrow CK).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
f2 · CokernelArrow CK = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x CK
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
f1 · CokernelArrow CK = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x CK
 apply CokernelCompZero.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
isCokernel (to_Zero A) f2 (CokernelArrow CK)
  (paths_rect (A ⟦ x, y ⟧) f1
     (λ (f2 : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (_ : f1 = f2),
      f2 · CokernelArrow CK =
      ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x CK)
     (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK) f2 e)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f1
isCokernel (to_Zero A) f1 (CokernelArrow CK)
  (paths_rect (A ⟦ x, y ⟧) f1
     (λ (f2 : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (_ : f1 = f2),
      f2 · CokernelArrow CK =
      ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x CK)
     (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK) f1 (idpath f1))
 apply (CokernelisCokernel _ CK).
  Defined.

  (** The morphism f is monic if its kernel is zero. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
isMonic f

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
isMonic f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y)
  f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f

  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
u = v

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq

      apply idpath.

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧

  f H

  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f

e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar = f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · Coeqar = f

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
XX:= CoequalizerCommutes Coeq z f H': CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H' = f
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · Coeqar = f

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
XX:= CoequalizerCommutes Coeq z f H': CoequalizerArrow Coeq · Coeqar = f
CoequalizerArrow Coeq · Coeqar = f

      apply XX.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  z
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y)
  f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H

e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar

  z

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
· (CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  z
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
· CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  z

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  Coeq_coker · Coeqar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  z

      apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.

Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧

Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧

     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧

u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)

  f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y

  (KernelArrow

ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f

e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))

KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)) e2
· KernelArrow ker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  y
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y)
  f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A

Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
