A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
coker2:= KernelZeroMonic_cokernel e4 Coeq_coker: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y)
is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)

      apply (is_iso_qinv _ _ (CokernelofZeroArrow_is_iso (to_Zero A) coker2)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq:= CoequalizerEqAr Coeq: u · CoequalizerArrow Coeq =
v · CoequalizerArrow Coeq
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u · CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· inv_from_iso isoar =
v · CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· inv_from_iso isoar
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u
· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar) =
v · CoequalizerArrow Coeq
· inv_from_iso isoar
u = v
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u
· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar) =
v
· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar)
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u
· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar) =
v
· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar)
CoequalizerArrow Coeq = isoar
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y)
  f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u
· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar) =
v
· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar)
areq: CoequalizerArrow Coeq = isoar
u = v

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧

Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f

e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =

  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq

· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar) =
v
· (CoequalizerArrow Coeq
   · inv_from_iso isoar)
areq: CoequalizerArrow Coeq = isoar
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u · (isoar · inv_from_iso isoar) =
v · (isoar · inv_from_iso isoar)
areq: CoequalizerArrow Coeq = isoar
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u · identity y = v · identity y
areq: CoequalizerArrow Coeq = isoar
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H

u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f

e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u · identity y = v · identity y
areq: CoequalizerArrow Coeq = isoar
u = v · identity y
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)

e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u · identity y = v · identity y
areq: CoequalizerArrow Coeq = isoar
u = u · identity y
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': u · f = v · f
Coeq:= Coequalizer A u v: Coequalizers.Coequalizer u v
Coeqar:= CoequalizerOut Coeq z f H': A ⟦ Coeq, z ⟧
Coeqar_epi:= CoequalizerArrowEpi Coeq: Epi A y Coeq
Coeq_coker:= EpiToCokernel Coeqar_epi: Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H isK: Kernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: CokernelArrow Coeq_coker = CoequalizerArrow Coeq
e1: f = CokernelArrow Coeq_coker · Coeqar
e2: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
ar:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) z
→ A ⟦ to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi, ker ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi))
  e2 · KernelArrow ker =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi)
e3: KernelArrow ker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ker y
e4: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y Coeq Coeqar_epi) y
e5: is_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq)
isoar:= make_iso (CoequalizerArrow Coeq) e5: iso y Coeq
coeq_eq: u · identity y = v · identity y
areq: CoequalizerArrow Coeq = isoar
u · identity y = u

    apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
Monic A y z

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) f H
Monic A y z

    exact (make_Monic A f (KernelZeroisMonic f H isK)).
  Defined.


  (** ** CokernelArrow = ToZero ⇒ isEpi *)

  (** The following Definition is used in the next Definition. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
Kernel (to_Zero A) f2

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
Kernel (to_Zero A) f2

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
A
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
A ⟦ ?x, x ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
?f · f2 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) ?x y
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
isKernel (to_Zero A) ?f f2 ?H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
A
 exact K.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
A ⟦ K, x ⟧
 exact (KernelArrow K).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
KernelArrow K · f2 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K y
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
KernelArrow K · f1 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K y
 apply KernelCompZero.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
e: f1 = f2
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K) f2
  (paths_rect (A ⟦ x, y ⟧) f1
     (λ (f2 : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (_ : f1 = f2),
      KernelArrow K · f2 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K y)
     (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K) f2 e)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f1: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
K: Kernel (to_Zero A) f1
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K) f1
  (paths_rect (A ⟦ x, y ⟧) f1
     (λ (f2 : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (_ : f1 = f2),
      KernelArrow K · f2 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K y)
     (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) K) f1 (idpath f1))
 apply (KernelisKernel (to_Zero A) K).
  Defined.

  (** The morphism f is epic if its cokernel is zero. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
isEpi f

u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
u = v

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H

u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v

  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))

x, y, z: A

  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

x, y, z: A

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
XX:= EqualizerCommutes Eq x f H': EqualizerIn Eq x f H' · EqualizerArrow Eq = f
Eqar · EqualizerArrow Eq = f

x, y, z: A

Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
XX:= EqualizerCommutes Eq x f H': Eqar · EqualizerArrow Eq = f
Eqar · EqualizerArrow Eq = f

      apply XX.

u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧

  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
Eqar
· (KernelArrow Eq_ker
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
tmp:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ Eq, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧,
   Eqar · f) (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) Eq_ker): (λ f : A ⟦ Eq, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧,
 Eqar · f)
  (KernelArrow Eq_ker
   · CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) =
(λ f : A ⟦ Eq, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧,
 Eqar · f)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Eq_ker
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
Eqar
· (KernelArrow Eq_ker
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
tmp:= maponpaths
  (λ f : A ⟦ Eq, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧,
   Eqar · f) (KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) Eq_ker): (λ f : A ⟦ Eq, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧,
 Eqar · f)
  (KernelArrow Eq_ker
   · CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) =
(λ f : A ⟦ Eq, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧,
 Eqar · f)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Eq_ker
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
Eqar
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Eq_ker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

      apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧

Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
u = v

w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker

    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
CokernelArrow coker = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker

      apply idpath.

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker

    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =

e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
u = v

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x

ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker

    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

    (CokernelArrow

e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
    e2 =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e5: is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
u = v

    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ker2:= CokernelZeroEpi_kernel e4 Eq_ker: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)

      apply (is_iso_qinv _ _ (KernelofZeroArrow_is_iso (to_Zero A) ker2)).

  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =

    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker

    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

isoar:= make_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq) e5: iso Eq y

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e5: is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
isoar:= make_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq) e5: iso Eq y
Eq_eq:= EqualizerEqAr Eq: EqualizerArrow Eq · u = EqualizerArrow Eq · v
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e5: is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
isoar:= make_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq) e5: iso Eq y
Eq_eq: inv_from_iso isoar · (EqualizerArrow Eq · u) =
inv_from_iso isoar · (EqualizerArrow Eq · v)
u = v

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H

Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧

  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e5: is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
isoar:= make_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq) e5: iso Eq y
Eq_eq: inv_from_iso isoar · EqualizerArrow Eq · u =
inv_from_iso isoar · EqualizerArrow Eq · v
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e5: is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
isoar:= make_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq) e5: iso Eq y
Eq_eq: inv_from_iso isoar · EqualizerArrow Eq · u =
inv_from_iso isoar · EqualizerArrow Eq · v
EqualizerArrow Eq = isoar

    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =

  (CokernelArrow

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e5: is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
isoar:= make_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq) e5: iso Eq y
Eq_eq: identity y · u = identity y · v
areq: EqualizerArrow Eq = isoar
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e5: is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
isoar:= make_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq) e5: iso Eq y
Eq_eq: identity y · u = identity y · v
areq: EqualizerArrow Eq = isoar
u = identity y · v
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H

u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v

  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f

e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧

  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)

Eq_eq: identity y · u = identity y · v

u = identity y · u
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
w: A
u, v: A ⟦ y, w ⟧
H': f · u = f · v
Eq:= Equalizer A u v: Equalizers.Equalizer u v
Eqar:= EqualizerIn Eq x f H': A ⟦ x, Eq ⟧
Eqar_monic:= EqualizerArrowMonic Eq: Monic A Eq y
Eq_ker:= MonicToKernel Eqar_monic: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H isCK: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
e0: KernelArrow Eq_ker = EqualizerArrow Eq
e1: f = Eqar · KernelArrow Eq_ker
e2: f
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
ar:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic))
  e2: A ⟦ coker, to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker
    (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
    (CokernelArrow
       (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)) e2 =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e3: CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y coker
e4: CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
  (to_Cokernels A Eq y Eqar_monic)
e5: is_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq)
isoar:= make_iso (EqualizerArrow Eq) e5: iso Eq y
Eq_eq: identity y · u = identity y · v
areq: EqualizerArrow Eq = isoar
identity y · u = u

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
Epi A x y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) H
Epi A x y

    exact (make_Epi A f (CokernelZeroisEpi f H isCK)).
  Defined.

End abelian_MonicToKernels.


(** * Factorization of morphisms
  In this section we prove that every morphism factors as Epi · Monic in 2 canonical ways. To do
  this we need to prove that the canonical morphism CoIm f --> Im f is an isomorphism.
*)
Section abelian_factorization.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  (** ** Kernels, Cokernels, CoImage, and Image *)

  Definition Kernel {x y : A} (f : x --> y) : Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) f := to_Kernels A x y f.

  Definition Cokernel {x y : A} (f : x --> y) : Cokernel (to_Zero A) f := to_Cokernels A x y f.

  Definition CoImage {x y : A} (f : x --> y) :
    Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Kernel f)) :=
    to_Cokernels A _ _ (KernelArrow (Kernel f)).

  Definition Image {x y : A} (f : x --> y) :
    Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)) :=
    to_Kernels A _ _ (CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)).

  (** ** Construction of the morphism CoIm f --> Im f *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
KernelArrow (Kernel f) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel f) y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
KernelArrow (Kernel f) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel f) y

    apply KernelCompZero.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧

    apply (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f)).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_ar f
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Cokernel f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_ar f
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f
  (CoIm_ar_eq f): CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f) = f
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_ar f
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f
  (CoIm_ar_eq f): CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_ar f = f
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_ar f
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Cokernel f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f
  (CoIm_ar_eq f): CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_ar f = f
f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Cokernel f)

    apply CokernelCompZero.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))
CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))
e1:= CoIm_to_Im_eq1 f: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_ar f
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Cokernel f)
CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))
e1: CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· (CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Cokernel f)
CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))
e1: CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· (CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)
CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))
e1: CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)
CoIm_ar f · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) (Cokernel f)
 exact e1.
  Qed.

  Definition CoIm_to_Im {x y : A} (f : x --> y) :
    A⟦CoImage f, Image f⟧ :=
    KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f) (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f).

  (** ** f = (x --> CoIm f) · (CoIm f --> Im f) · (Im f --> y) *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f)
    (CoIm_ar f) (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f)
· KernelArrow (Image f)

    (* Commutativity of cokernel *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
com0:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f): CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f) = f
f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f)
    (CoIm_ar f) (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f)
· KernelArrow (Image f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
com0: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f)
f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f)
    (CoIm_ar f) (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f)
· KernelArrow (Image f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
com0: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f
    (CoIm_ar_eq f) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f)
    (CoIm_ar f) (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f)
· KernelArrow (Image f)

    (* Cancel precomposition *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
com0: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f
    (CoIm_ar_eq f) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f)
     (CoIm_ar f) (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f)
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
com0: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f)
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f) · KernelArrow (Image f)

    (* Commutativity of kernel *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
com0: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f)
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Image f) (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f)
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f): KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) 
  (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f) 
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f) · KernelArrow (Image f) =
CoIm_ar f
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f)
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f) · KernelArrow (Image f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
com0: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f)
com1: CoIm_ar f =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) 
  (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f) 
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f) · KernelArrow (Image f)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f)
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f) · KernelArrow (Image f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
com0: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (CoImage f) y f (CoIm_ar_eq f)
com1: CoIm_ar f =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) 
  (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f) 
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f) · KernelArrow (Image f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f)
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f) · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image f) (CoImage f) (CoIm_ar f)
  (CoIm_to_Im_eq2 f) · KernelArrow (Image f)

    (* idpath *)
    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** CoIm f --> Im f is an isomorphism. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_z_isomorphism (CoIm_to_Im f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_z_isomorphism (CoIm_to_Im f)

    (* It suffices to show that this morphism is monic and epi. *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (CoIm_to_Im f)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CoIm_to_Im f)

    (* isMonic *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (CoIm_to_Im f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2

ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y
  (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧

isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

  (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isEpi (CoequalizerArrow q)

        apply CoequalizerArrowisEpi.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
