com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y
  (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
tmp:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (EpiToCokernel E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
tmp:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (EpiToCokernel E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (EpiToCokernel E)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
tmp:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (EpiToCokernel E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (EpiToCokernel E)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
tmp:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel E): KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (EpiToCokernel E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow
  (EpiToCokernel
     (make_Epi A
        (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
         · CoequalizerArrow q) isE))
 apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y
  (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y

        (* Use CoImage Image equation *)
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
tmp:= CoIm_to_Im_eq f: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y

f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)

KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =

q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2

    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =

  (EpiToCokernel E)
tmp: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y

        (* rewrite com1 *)
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
tmp: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))) =

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
tmp: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · (CoequalizerArrow q
      · CoequalizerOut q y
          (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y

        (* cancel postcompostion and use e0 *)
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
tmp: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· (CoequalizerArrow q
   · CoequalizerOut q y
       (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
tmp: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y

    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
tmpar1:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y tmpar1 H =

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
tmp: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
   · KernelArrow (Image f))
tmpar1:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
tmpar2:= CoequalizerOut q y tmpar1 H: A ⟦ q, y ⟧
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) q
 apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧

· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧

z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
tmp:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Kernel f) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e
· KernelArrow (Kernel f) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) (CoImage f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
tmp:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Kernel f) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e
· KernelArrow (Kernel f) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e
· KernelArrow (Kernel f) · CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) (CoImage f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2

ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
tmp:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Kernel f) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e
· KernelArrow (Kernel f) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
l · KernelArrow (Kernel f) · CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) (CoImage f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
tmp:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Kernel f) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e
· KernelArrow (Kernel f) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
l · KernelArrow (Kernel f) · CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
l · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel f) (CoImage f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
tmp:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Kernel f) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e
· KernelArrow (Kernel f) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
l
· (KernelArrow (Kernel f) · CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) =
l · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel f) (CoImage f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
tmp:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Kernel f) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e
· KernelArrow (Kernel f) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
KernelArrow (Kernel f) · CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel f) (CoImage f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
tmp:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Kernel f) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e
· KernelArrow (Kernel f) =
KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
KernelArrow (Kernel f)
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A (Kernel f) x
       (KernelArrow (Kernel f))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A (Kernel f) x
     (KernelArrow (Kernel f)))

        apply CokernelCompZero.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
g1 = g2

· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)
    (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A

g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y
  (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)

· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =

  (to_Kernels A x q E)

· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)

CokernelArrow (CoImage f)

        apply com2.

    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =

isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =

    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)

    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
isE1:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): ∏ (z : A) (g h : A ⟦ CoImage f, z ⟧),
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · g =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · h → 
g = h
CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)
    (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)

· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
isE1:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): ∏ (z : A) (g h : A ⟦ CoImage f, z ⟧),
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · g =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · h → 
g = h
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· (CoequalizerArrow q
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)
       (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · identity (CoImage f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
isE1:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): ∏ (z : A) (g h : A ⟦ CoImage f, z ⟧),
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · g =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · h → 
g = h
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)
    (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · identity (CoImage f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧

g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q

  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y

  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
isE1:= CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (CoImage f): ∏ (z : A) (g h : A ⟦ CoImage f, z ⟧),
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · g =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · h → 
g = h
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)
    (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)

        apply e2.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧

com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y

  (to_Kernels A x q E)

· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =

  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧

    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)
g1 = g2

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2

com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)

· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧

· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)
isMonic (CoequalizerArrow q)

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2

ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y
  (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧

· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =

  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker

    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)
e4: isMonic (CoequalizerArrow q)
g1 = g2

ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)
tmp:= identity_isMonic A: isMonic (identity (CoImage f))
isMonic
  (CoequalizerArrow q
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)
       (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)
tmp: isMonic
  (CoequalizerArrow q
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
       (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))
       e1)
isMonic
  (CoequalizerArrow q
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker (CoImage f)
       (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1)

        apply tmp.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)
e4: isMonic (CoequalizerArrow q)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)
e4: isMonic (CoequalizerArrow q)
coeqeq:= CoequalizerEqAr q: g1 · CoequalizerArrow q =
g2 · CoequalizerArrow q
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ z, CoImage f ⟧
H: g1 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
g2 · (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))
q:= Coequalizer A g1 g2: Coequalizers.Coequalizer g1 g2
ar:= CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f): A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
ar1:= CoequalizerOut q y ar: g1 · ar = g2 · ar → A ⟦ q, y ⟧
com1:= CoequalizerCommutes q y (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H: CoequalizerArrow q
· CoequalizerOut q y
    (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) H =
CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)
isE: isEpi
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
   · CoequalizerArrow q)
E:= make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q)
  isE: Epi A x q
coker:= EpiToCokernel E: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E))
e0: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (EpiToCokernel E)
e: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E) · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E) y
l:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel f)
  (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)) e: A ⟦ to_Kernels A x q E, Kernel f ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (to_Kernels A x q E)
· CokernelArrow (CoImage f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Kernels A x q E)
  (CoImage f)
ar2:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: A ⟦ coker, CoImage f ⟧
com2:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker 
  (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1: CokernelArrow coker
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e2: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
e3: CoequalizerArrow q
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker 
    (CoImage f) (CokernelArrow (CoImage f)) e1 =
identity (CoImage f)
e4: isMonic (CoequalizerArrow q)
coeqeq: g1 = g2
g1 = g2

      apply coeqeq.
    (* isEpi *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CoIm_to_Im f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isMonic (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2

ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isMonic (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isMonic (EqualizerArrow q)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isMonic (KernelArrow (Image f))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isMonic (KernelArrow (Image f))

        apply KernelArrowisMonic.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
g1 = g2

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2

ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f

  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))

  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y

  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))

· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
