  (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
KernelArrow (MonicToKernel M)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
 apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        (* Use CoImage Image equation *)
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp:= CoIm_to_Im_eq f: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        (* rewrite com1 *)
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        (* cancel precomposition and rewrite e0 *)
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmpar1:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
EqualizerIn q x tmpar1 H · EqualizerArrow q
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmpar1:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
tmpar2:= EqualizerIn q x tmpar1 H: A ⟦ x, q ⟧
tmpar2 · EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmpar1:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
tmpar2:= EqualizerIn q x tmpar1 H: A ⟦ x, q ⟧
tmpar2 · EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
tmpar2
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) q (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmpar1:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
tmpar2:= EqualizerIn q x tmpar1 H: A ⟦ x, q ⟧
tmpar2 · EqualizerArrow q
· (KernelArrow (Image f)
   · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) =
tmpar2
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) q (to_Cokernels A q y M)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))

· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)

· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)

tmpar2:= EqualizerIn q x tmpar1 H: A ⟦ x, q ⟧
tmpar2
· (EqualizerArrow q
   · (KernelArrow (Image f)
      · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))) =
tmpar2
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) q (to_Cokernels A q y M)

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2

com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))

· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =

  (to_Cokernels A q y M)

· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)

tmpar2:= EqualizerIn q x tmpar1 H: A ⟦ x, q ⟧
EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) q (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
tmpar1:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
tmpar2:= EqualizerIn q x tmpar1 H: A ⟦ x, q ⟧
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) q (to_Cokernels A q y M)
 apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
KernelArrow (Image f)
· (CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
       (to_Cokernels A q y M)
       (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
KernelArrow (Image f)
· (CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) · l) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
KernelArrow (Image f)
· (CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) · l) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f) (Cokernel f) · l

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
KernelArrow (Image f) · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) · l =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f) (Cokernel f) · l

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
KernelArrow (Image f) · CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f) (Cokernel f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
tmp:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) 
  (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) 
    (Cokernel f) (to_Cokernels A q y M)
    (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e =
CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)
KernelArrow
  (to_Kernels A y (Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Cokernel f)))
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y (Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Cokernel f))) (Cokernel f)

        apply KernelCompZero.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q
· KernelArrow (Image f) = KernelArrow (Image f)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q
· KernelArrow (Image f) = KernelArrow (Image f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q
· KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · KernelArrow ker
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · KernelArrow ker

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow ker
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (MonicToKernel M)

        apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q =
identity (Image f)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q =
identity (Image f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
isM1:= KernelArrowisMonic (to_Zero A) (Image f): isMonic (KernelArrow (Image f))
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q =
identity (Image f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
isM1:= KernelArrowisMonic (to_Zero A) (Image f): ∏ (x0 : A) (g h : A ⟦ x0, Image f ⟧),
g · KernelArrow (Image f) =
h · KernelArrow (Image f) → 
g = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q =
identity (Image f)

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =

· EqualizerArrow q =

  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))

  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧

  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
isM1:= KernelArrowisMonic (to_Zero A) (Image f): ∏ (x0 : A) (g h : A ⟦ x0, Image f ⟧),
g · KernelArrow (Image f) =
h · KernelArrow (Image f) → 
g = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q
· KernelArrow (Image f) =
identity (Image f) · KernelArrow (Image f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =

q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2

ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
isM1:= KernelArrowisMonic (to_Zero A) (Image f): ∏ (x0 : A) (g h : A ⟦ x0, Image f ⟧),
g · KernelArrow (Image f) =
h · KernelArrow (Image f) → 
g = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
  (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q
· KernelArrow (Image f) = KernelArrow (Image f)

        apply e2.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
isEpi (EqualizerArrow q)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
e4: isEpi (EqualizerArrow q)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
isEpi (EqualizerArrow q)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
isEpi
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
     (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q)
