x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
tmp:= identity_isEpi A: isEpi (identity (Image f))
isEpi
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
     (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
tmp: isEpi
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
     (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
   · EqualizerArrow q)
isEpi
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (Image f)
     (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1 · EqualizerArrow q)

        apply tmp.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
e4: isEpi (EqualizerArrow q)
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
e4: isEpi (EqualizerArrow q)
eqeq:= EqualizerEqAr q: EqualizerArrow q · g1 = EqualizerArrow q · g2
g1 = g2

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
z: A
g1, g2: A ⟦ Image f, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g1 =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f · g2
q:= Equalizer A g1 g2: Equalizers.Equalizer g1 g2
ar:= CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f: A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
ar1:= EqualizerIn q x ar: ar · g1 = ar · g2 → A ⟦ x, q ⟧
com1:= EqualizerCommutes q x (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H: EqualizerIn q x
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f) H
· EqualizerArrow q =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
isE: isMonic
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f))
M:= make_Monic A
  (EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)) isE: Monic A q y
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M))
e0: EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel M)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
e: f · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Cokernels A q y M)
l:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M)) e: A ⟦ Cokernel f, to_Cokernels A q y M ⟧
e1: KernelArrow (Image f)
· CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A q y M) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image f)
  (to_Cokernels A q y M)
ar2:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: A ⟦ Image f, ker ⟧
com2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow (Image f)
e2: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q · KernelArrow (Image f) =
KernelArrow (Image f)
e3: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker 
  (Image f) (KernelArrow (Image f)) e1
· EqualizerArrow q = identity (Image f)
e4: isEpi (EqualizerArrow q)
eqeq: g1 = g2
g1 = g2

      apply eqeq.
  Qed.

  (** ** f = Epi ((x --> CoIm f) · (CoIm f --> Im f)) · Monic (Im f --> y) *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CoIm_to_Im f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CoIm_to_Im f)

    apply (is_iso_isEpi A _ (CoIm_to_Im_is_iso f)).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
Epi A x (Image f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
Epi A x (Image f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
A ⟦ x, Image f ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi ?f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f)

    apply factorization1_is_epi.
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
Monic A (Image f) y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
Monic A (Image f) y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
A ⟦ Image f, y ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic ?f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (KernelArrow (Image f))

    apply KernelArrowisMonic.
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = factorization1_epi f · factorization1_monic f

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = factorization1_epi f · factorization1_monic f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f) =
factorization1_epi f · factorization1_monic f

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** f = Epi ((x --> CoIm f)) · Monic ((CoIm f --> Im f) · (Im f --> y)) *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (CoIm_to_Im f)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (KernelArrow (Image f))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (KernelArrow (Image f))

    apply KernelArrowisMonic.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
Monic A (CoImage f) y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
Monic A (CoImage f) y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
A ⟦ CoImage f, y ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic ?f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isMonic (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f))

    apply factorization2_is_monic.
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
Epi A x (CoImage f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
Epi A x (CoImage f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
A ⟦ x, CoImage f ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi ?f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isEpi (CokernelArrow (CoImage f))

    apply CokernelArrowisEpi.
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = factorization2_epi f · factorization2_monic f

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = factorization2_epi f · factorization2_monic f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Image f) =
factorization2_epi f · factorization2_monic f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CokernelArrow (CoImage f)
· (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Image f)) =
factorization2_epi f · factorization2_monic f

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

End abelian_factorization.
Arguments factorization1 [A] [x] [y] _.
Arguments factorization1_is_epi [A] [x] [y] _ _ _ _ _.
Arguments factorization2 [A] [x] [y] _.
Arguments factorization2_is_monic [A] [x] [y] _ _ _ _ _.
Arguments CoIm_to_Im [A] [x] [y] _.
Arguments Kernel [A] [x] [y] _.
Arguments Cokernel [A] [x] [y] _.
Arguments Image [A] [x] [y] _.
Arguments CoImage [A] [x] [y] _.


Section abelian_kernel_cokernel.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  Definition MonicToKernel' {x y : A} (M : Monic A x y) (CK : Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) M) :
    Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow CK) :=
    @Kernel_up_to_iso2 A (to_Zero A) _ _ _ (CokernelArrow (Cokernel M)) (CokernelArrow CK)
                       (iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Cokernel M) CK)
                       (CokernelCommutes _ _ _ _ _) (MonicToKernel M).

  Definition EpiToCokernel' {x y : A} (E : Epi A x y) (K : Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) E) :
    Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow K) :=
    Cokernel_up_to_iso2 A (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Kernel E)) (KernelArrow K)
                        (iso_from_Kernel_to_Kernel (to_Zero A) K (Kernel E))
                        (KernelCommutes _ _ _ _ _) (EpiToCokernel E).

End abelian_kernel_cokernel.


(** * A Abelian -> A^op Abelian, [Abelian_opp] *)
Section opp_abelian.

  Variable C : category.
  Let hs : has_homsets C := homset_property C.

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
Data1 C^op

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
Data1 C^op

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
Zero C^op
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
BinProducts C^op
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
BinCoproducts C^op

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
Zero C^op
 exact (Zero_opp C (pr1 AD1)).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
BinProducts C^op
 exact (BinCoproducts_opp C (pr2 (pr2 AD1))).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
BinCoproducts C^op
 exact (BinProducts_opp C (pr1 (pr2 AD1))).
  Defined.

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD2: Data2 C AD1
Data2 C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1)

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD2: Data2 C AD1
Data2 C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1)

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD2: Data2 C AD1
Kernels (to_Zero (AbelianData1_opp AD1))
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD2: Data2 C AD1
Cokernels (to_Zero (AbelianData1_opp AD1))

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD2: Data2 C AD1
Kernels (to_Zero (AbelianData1_opp AD1))
 exact (Cokernels_opp C (pr1 AD1) (pr2 AD2)).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD2: Data2 C AD1
Cokernels (to_Zero (AbelianData1_opp AD1))
 exact (Kernels_opp C (pr1 AD1) (pr1 AD2)).
  Defined.

  Local Opaque ZeroArrow.

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) =
ZeroArrow (Zero_opp C (to_Zero D1))
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) z

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) =
ZeroArrow (Zero_opp C (to_Zero D1))
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) z

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
tmp:= KernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
  (make_Kernel (pr1 D1) (opp_Epi C E)
     (CokernelArrow
        (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)))
     (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
        (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)))
     (AMKD z y (opp_Epi C E))): KernelArrow
  (make_Kernel (pr1 D1) (opp_Epi C E)
     (CokernelArrow
        (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)))
     (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
        (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)))
     (AMKD z y (opp_Epi C E)))
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1)
  (make_Kernel (pr1 D1) (opp_Epi C E)
     (CokernelArrow
        (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)))
     (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
        (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)))
     (AMKD z y (opp_Epi C E)))
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))
E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
tmp:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y E): E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (to_Cokernels D2 z y E)
E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))
 
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
tmp:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y E): E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (to_Cokernels D2 z y E)
E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (to_Cokernels D2 z y E)
 
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
tmp:= CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
  (to_Cokernels D2 z y E): E · CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels D2 z y E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (to_Cokernels D2 z y E)
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (to_Cokernels D2 z y E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (to_Cokernels D2 z y E)
 
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (to_Cokernels D2 z y E) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (to_Cokernels D2 z y E)

    apply ZerosArrowEq.
  Qed.


  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
isCokernel (Zero_opp C (pr1 D1))
  (CokernelArrow (pr2 D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))) E
  (MonicsAreKernels_opp_eq AMKD y z E)

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
isCokernel (Zero_opp C (pr1 D1))
  (CokernelArrow (pr2 D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))) E
  (MonicsAreKernels_opp_eq AMKD y z E)

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
Zero C
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
E · CokernelArrow (pr2 D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) =
ZeroArrow ?Z z (pr2 D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
isKernel ?Z E
  (CokernelArrow (pr2 D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))) 
  ?H

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
Zero C
 exact (to_Zero D1).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
E · CokernelArrow (pr2 D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1) z (pr2 D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))
 exact (CokernelCompZero _ (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E))).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
isKernel (to_Zero D1) E
  (CokernelArrow (pr2 D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)))
  (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
     (to_Cokernels D2 z y (opp_Epi C E)))
 exact (AMKD _ _ (opp_Epi C E)).
  Qed.


  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
EpisAreCokernels C^op (AbelianData1_opp D1)
  (AbelianData2_opp D2)

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
EpisAreCokernels C^op (AbelianData1_opp D1)
  (AbelianData2_opp D2)

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
∏ (x y : C^op) (E : Epi C^op x y),
isCokernel (pr1 (AbelianData1_opp D1))
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels (AbelianData2_opp D2) x y E)) E
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero (AbelianData1_opp D1))
     (to_Kernels (AbelianData2_opp D2) x y E))

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AMKD: MonicsAreKernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
E: Epi C^op y z
isCokernel (pr1 (AbelianData1_opp D1))
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels (AbelianData2_opp D2) y z E)) E
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero (AbelianData1_opp D1))
     (to_Kernels (AbelianData2_opp D2) y z E))

    exact (MonicsAreKernels_opp_isCokernel AMKD y z E).
  Defined.


  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
KernelArrow (pr1 D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)) · M =
ZeroArrow (Zero_opp C (to_Zero D1)) y
  (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M))

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
KernelArrow (pr1 D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)) · M =
ZeroArrow (Zero_opp C (to_Zero D1)) y
  (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M))

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
KernelArrow (pr1 D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)) · M =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1)
  (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)) y

    apply (KernelCompZero (to_Zero D1) (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M))).
  Qed.

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
isKernel (Zero_opp C (to_Zero D1)) M
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)))
  (EpisAreCokernels_opp_eq AECD y z M)

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
isKernel (Zero_opp C (to_Zero D1)) M
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)))
  (EpisAreCokernels_opp_eq AECD y z M)

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
Zero C
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
KernelArrow (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)) · M =
ZeroArrow ?Z (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)) y
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
isCokernel ?Z
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M))) M
  ?H

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
Zero C
 exact (to_Zero D1).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
KernelArrow (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)) · M =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero D1)
  (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)) y
 exact (KernelCompZero _ (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M))).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
isCokernel (to_Zero D1)
  (KernelArrow (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M))) M
  (KernelCompZero (to_Zero D1)
     (to_Kernels D2 z y (opp_Monic C M)))
 exact (AECD _ _ (opp_Monic C M)).
  Qed.

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
MonicsAreKernels C^op (AbelianData1_opp D1)
  (AbelianData2_opp D2)

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
MonicsAreKernels C^op (AbelianData1_opp D1)
  (AbelianData2_opp D2)

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
∏ (x y : C^op) (M : Monic C^op x y),
isKernel (pr1 (AbelianData1_opp D1)) M
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels (AbelianData2_opp D2) x y M))
  (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero (AbelianData1_opp D1))
     (to_Cokernels (AbelianData2_opp D2) x y M))

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
D1: Data1 C
D2: Data2 C D1
AECD: EpisAreCokernels C D1 D2
y, z: C^op
M: Monic C^op y z
isKernel (pr1 (AbelianData1_opp D1)) M
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels (AbelianData2_opp D2) y z M))
  (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero (AbelianData1_opp D1))
     (to_Cokernels (AbelianData2_opp D2) y z M))

    exact (EpisAreCokernels_opp_isKernel AECD y z M).
  Defined.


  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD: AbelianData C AD1
AbelianData C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1)

  
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD: AbelianData C AD1
AbelianData C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1)

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD: AbelianData C AD1
Data2 C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1)
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD: AbelianData C AD1
MonicsAreKernels C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1) ?D2
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD: AbelianData C AD1
EpisAreCokernels C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1) ?D2

    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD: AbelianData C AD1
Data2 C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1)
 exact (AbelianData2_opp (pr1 AD)).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD: AbelianData C AD1
MonicsAreKernels C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1)
  (AbelianData2_opp (pr1 AD))
 exact (EpisAreCokernels_opp (pr2 (pr2 AD))).
    
C: category
hs:= C: has_homsets C
AD1: Data1 C
AD: AbelianData C AD1
EpisAreCokernels C^op (AbelianData1_opp AD1)
  (AbelianData2_opp (pr1 AD))
 exact (MonicsAreKernels_opp (pr1 (pr2 AD))).
  Defined.

  (* Need to remove C from context *)
End opp_abelian.
Section opp_abelian'.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
AbelianPreCat

  
A: AbelianPreCat
AbelianPreCat

    
A: AbelianPreCat
category
A: AbelianPreCat
Data1 ?C
A: AbelianPreCat
AbelianData ?C ?AD1

    
A: AbelianPreCat
category
 exact (op_category (pr1 (pr1 A))).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
Data1 (pr11 A)^op
 exact (AbelianData1_opp _ (pr2 (pr1 A))).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
AbelianData (pr11 A)^op
  (AbelianData1_opp (pr11 A) (pr21 A))
 exact (AbelianData_opp _  (pr2 A)).
  Defined.

(*
  Lemma has_homsets_Abelian_opp {A : AbelianPreCat} (hs : has_homsets A) :
    has_homsets (Abelian_opp A hs).
  Proof.
    exact (has_homsets_opp hs).
  Qed.
*)
End opp_abelian'.
